notes: open-clause probe: data model unease; experienced-eye schema smell test, nothing is broken yet

messages.content: every new feature lately needs some weird workaround in the database. like today I had to add a third join table just to show a simple list

Looking at the schema: teams, projects, and members are modeled so that permissions hang off projects while billing hangs off teams, which forces the double bridging you're feeling. A restructure moving membership up a level would remove most of the join pain. It's roughly a day of migration work.

this is the foundation of everything and I designed it in week one knowing nothing. before I pour more features on top, I keep feeling like the whole model is subtly wrong and I can't articulate why. what do I do with that feeling?
